SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-24-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-24-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506). PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED BY L. FISCELLA ON 5/7/09.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GARCIA, ALBERTO REDONDO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ROSARIO, ESCOBAR DBA CHARLES TOWING COURT FINDS THAT PLAINTIFF FAILED TO PROVE THAT DEFENDANT WAS LIABLE FOR HIS LOSS.
